_README: EXAMPLE ONLY — not active. Copy the parts you want into .claude/settings.json and confirm before relying on them. See docs/hooks-plan.md. No hook here is destructive, sends data externally, or modifies user-level settings.

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-format files after Claude edits them.

PreToolUse._comment: Advisory warning before potentially dangerous shell commands.

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *"rm -rf"*|*"push --force"*|*"audit fix --force"*) echo 'WARNING: potentially destructive command — review before approving.' ;; esac

Stop._comment: Run the content safety gate when a session ends (non-blocking).
